**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level high-altitude financial center deconstruction and the '0-employee audio-visual/security weak-current contractor shell' physical demotion probe. The illusory Apple consumer electronics OEM template in the original data has been completely cleared to zero. This enterprise, named 'Fusheng Smart Technology,' was mechanically categorized into 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' by the official system. The opening statement of its business license claims 'smart equipment production.' However, the forensic logic engine directly pierced through this manufacturing disguise, grasping its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is an absolute 0! The paid-in capital is 1 million. The most fatal blow similarly comes from its highly glamorous spatial coordinates: 'Room C18, 5th Floor, Nanjing Jiangning Science and Technology Financial Center, No. 391 Tianyuan Road.' The logical deduction instantly turned into a commercial satire: on the 5th floor of the 'Science and Technology Financial Center' where land is at a premium, possibly just a shared desk with the number C18, the boss hasn't hired a single employee, yet claims to have built a 'smart equipment production line'? The probe mercilessly deleted the word 'production' used for bragging in the license, extracting the actual work it can take on in the real world: 'sales of audio-visual equipment, multimedia equipment, security products; weak-current engineering, security engineering construction; system integration.' The truth is starkly naked and strongly features the characteristics of the Chinese weak-current engineering circle: this is a 100% pure 0-Employee High-Rise AV/Security Engineering Broker (operating out of a financial center shell). The boss registered this highly tech-sounding shell with a 1 million paid-in capital in order to bid on projects like conference room audio-visual renovations, building surveillance security, or weak-current wiring. After securing a job, they produce no equipment themselves, relying entirely on buying ready-made multimedia equipment and cameras, and then subcontracting the installation to outside construction teams. The official 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' tag is the deepest misunderstanding of this purely engineering intermediary attribute.
